parent.title: M8: Parent sprint issue
parent.body:
## Safety Posture
- human-triggered operations only
- read-only planning by default
- no autonomous mutation

## Acceptance Criteria
- Parent issue body is complete

## Validation
- python -m pytest

children.title: M8: Child sample
children.body:

## Validation
